entry.title: New: Bill 60 (2025) (Maui) — Agenda Ready
entry.content:
"A BILL FOR AN ORDINANCE AMENDING THE FISCAL YEAR 2025 BUDGET FOR THE COUNTY OF MAUI, ESTIMATED REVENUES; CAPITAL IMPROVEMENT PROJECTS, DEPARTMENT OF WATER SUPPLY, COUNTYWIDE, WATER FUND - RESTRICTED; APPENDIX A, PART II, GENERAL EXCISE TAX FUND; AND APPENDIX C, DEPARTMENT OF MANAGEMENT, COUNTYWIDE; AND DEPARTMENT OF WATER SUPPLY, COUNTYWIDE" This bill proposes to amend the Fiscal Year 2025 Budget to increase the appropriation for wastewater repairs related to the August 2023 Wildfires in the amount of $1,443,000.

Council of the County of Maui

View on the council site
